story.text:
# ✨ Evoke Name
**🪶 → 📛 → 📜 → 🤝**
*faunia · naming · V59*

The Evoke phase of Run · Evoke · Spawn: receive the Mage's chosen name for the spawned agent and write the binding (AGENTS.md for Sovereign-to-creature instructions; SOUL.md if the substrate carries one).

> The Mage names what crosses. The naming binds the wild thing to the bearer.

*Keywords:* evoke · name · bind · AGENTS.md · SOUL.md · v59
